prompt: Create a solution spec: A Platform ThatAI. Target user: Tech hiring manager at a mid-sized company. Solution: A platform that uses AI-powered matching to connect top engineers with job openings that align with their interests and skills. Revenue model: Monthly SaaS subscription

Create a solution spec: An All-in-one JobAI. Target user: Tech hiring manager at a mid-sized company. Solution: An all-in-one job posting platform that allows companies to advertise job openings on multiple platforms (e.g. LinkedIn, Glassdoor) and track applicants in one place. Revenue model: Monthly SaaS subscription

Create a solution spec: A Platform ThatAI. Target user: Recruiter at a tech company. Solution: A platform that provides AI-powered coding challenges and simulated interview questions for engineering candidates, allowing companies to accurately assess their skills and fit. Revenue model: Monthly SaaS subscription

Create a solution spec: A Platform ThatAI. Target user: Tech lead or manager at a company in the scientific computing or fintech industry. Solution: A platform that streamlines the hiring process for specialized engineers with expertise in scientific computing, utilizing AI-powered matching and automated workflows. Revenue model: Monthly SaaS subscription

Create a solution spec: A Video InterviewAI. Target user: Recruiter or hiring manager at a company in the scientific computing or fintech industry. Solution: A video interview platform specifically designed for technical roles, allowing for live coding challenges and real-time feedback to streamline the interview process. Revenue model: Monthly SaaS subscription

Create a solution spec: An Ai-powered LearningAI. Target user: Training manager or L&D specialist at a company in the scientific computing or fintech industry. Solution: An AI-powered learning platform that provides personalized training plans and adaptive courseware for upskilling and reskilling existing employees in scientific computing and related technologies. Revenue model: Monthly SaaS subscription

Create a solution spec: Ai-facilitated Onboarding PlatformAI. Target user: HR managers, Learning and Development professionals, and line managers at startups, agencies, and tech platforms. Solution: AI-facilitated onboarding platform offering data-driven onboarding pathways, ensuring a seamless integration process for new remote hires. Revenue model: Monthly SaaS subscription

Create a solution spec: Siteshield Is AAI. Target user: E-commerce site owners and online platform operators with 1-5 employees. Solution: SiteShield is a SaaS tool that provides automated website security and maintenance scans, alerting businesses to updates, vulnerabilities, and errors. Revenue model: Monthly SaaS subscription

Create a solution spec: Websitepro Is AAI. Target user: B2B and B2C e-commerce site owners, marketers, and IT professionals with a technical background. Solution: WebsitePro is a DIY website optimization and maintenance platform that provides AI-driven insights, actionable recommendations, and automated SEO and performance tools. Revenue model: Monthly SaaS subscription
